requirement_topic.en: Transport and dangerous-goods handling for lithium cells in transit to Cameroon
requirement_topic.zh: 运输要求——锂电芯危险货物运输处理
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸要求——鋰電芯危險貨物運輸處理

summary.en: UN 38.3 transport documentation is required in international shipping contexts for lithium battery consignments and is a recurring control point in Cameroon import handling. Exporters should provide UN 38.3 test evidence aligned to the shipped models and ensure transport classification and labeling are complete before dispatch. Because import control teams can request additional file clarity for mixed-load and air-sea cargo combinations, importer and consignee documentation should be synchronized with the transport mode used via Douala or Kribi channels.
summary.zh: 在国际运输背景下，锂电池货物通常需要UN 38.3运输文件，这也是喀麦隆进口处理中的常见控制点。出口商应按出货型号提供UN 38.3测试证据，并在装运前完整提供运输分类和标签信息。由于进口查验环节会对空运/海运联运和混合货形态提出追加核验，需与本地进口商和收货方同步运输文件。
summary.zht: 在國際運輸背景下，鋰電池貨物通常需要UN 38.3運輸文件，這也是喀麥隆進口處理中的常見控制點。出口商應按出貨型號提供UN 38.3測試證據，並在裝運前完整提供運輸分類和標簽資訊。由於進口查驗可能對空運/海運聯運與混合貨形態提出追加核驗，需與本地進口商和收貨方同步運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 transport testing requirement for lithium battery transport
Dangerous-goods handling practices used in Cameroon import logistics at Douala and Kribi
Air/sea operator and freight-declaration documentation requirements

summary.en: China-side export practice also relies on UN-related transport controls and test evidence for lithium batteries. However, Chinese internal compliance documents must still be integrated into Cameroon-specific import logistics documentation and importer declarations. A China CN report without importer-side transport linkage is often insufficient for cross-border release.
summary.zh: 中国出口实践同样依赖UN体系下的运输控制与测试证据。但中国国内文件仍需整合到喀麦隆本地进口物流文件和进口商声明中。若仅有中国内部报告而缺少与进口商衔接的运输交接文件，常不足以满足跨境放行。
summary.zht: 中國出口實務同樣依賴UN體系下的運輸控制與測試證據。但中國國內文件仍需整合到喀麥隆本地進口物流文件和進口商聲明中。若僅有中國內部報告而缺少與進口商銜接的運輸交接文件，常不足以滿足跨境放行。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 transport report from an accredited test route in the supply chain
Chinese export logistics and dangerous-goods paperwork for lithium battery batches

gap.en: The gap is not whether transport evidence exists, but whether it is accepted by Cameroon import channels in the importer-facing chain. Keep mode-specific documentation current for each consignment to Douala and Kribi. The practical failure mode is mismatch between China report format and Cameroon-facing import declarations.
gap.zh: 差距不在于是否有运输证据，而在于该证据能否被喀麦隆进口链路识别和接受。应按每一批到达杜阿拉或克里比的运输方式单独准备文件。常见失败点是中国报告格式与喀麦隆进口申报格式不匹配。
gap.zht: 差距不在於是否有運輸證據，而在於該證據能否被喀麥隆進口鏈路識別及接受。應按每批到達杜阿拉或克里比的運輸方式單獨準備文件。常見失敗點是中國報告格式與喀麥隆進口申報格式不匹配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in most commercial logistics scenarios; transport documentation and importer coordination are required before carriage and customs intake
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export logistics where lithium batteries are shipped; no standalone Cameroon-specific domestic equivalence

source.publisher: UN Economic Commission for Europe (UN 38.3 references)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Assume UN 38.3 is required for transport and align its report set with Cameroon importer logistics at each shipment through Douala or Kribi. Chinese transport evidence helps, but import release still depends on local importer-facing conformity and documentation completeness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 假设UN 38.3为运输必要文件，并按每批次经杜阿拉或克里比的喀麦隆进口链路配置文件。中国运输证据可提供支撑，但放行仍取决于进口商侧合规文件是否完整匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 假設UN 38.3為運輸必要文件，並按每批次經杜阿拉或克里比的喀麥隆進口鏈路配置文件。中國運輸證據可提供支撐，但放行仍取決於進口商側合規文件是否完整匹配。
